name: Auth0
description: Auth0 Management API for managing users, roles, connections, and organizations in your Auth0 tenant. Create and search users, assign roles, configure identity providers, and monitor authentication logs programmatically.

capabilities.name: list_users
capabilities.description: Search and list users in your Auth0 tenant with filtering, sorting, and pagination. Supports Lucene query syntax for advanced searches by email, name, or any user attribute.

capabilities.name: create_user
capabilities.description: Create a new user in a specific Auth0 database connection. Set email, password, and optional profile metadata at creation time.

capabilities.name: get_user
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single user's full profile by their Auth0 user ID. Returns email, identity providers, roles, metadata, and login history.

capabilities.name: update_user
capabilities.description: Update a user's profile attributes including email, name, password, blocked status, and custom metadata fields.

capabilities.name: assign_roles
capabilities.description: Assign one or more roles to a user. Roles control permissions and access to resources across your application.

capabilities.name: list_roles
capabilities.description: List all roles defined in your Auth0 tenant. Returns role names, descriptions, and IDs for use in role assignments.

capabilities.name: get_logs
capabilities.description: Retrieve authentication and management event logs from your Auth0 tenant. Filter by event type, user, date range, and more for security auditing.

capabilities.name: list_connections
capabilities.description: List all configured identity provider connections (database, social, enterprise) in your Auth0 tenant.
